object: Brand: Unbranded ; Model line: Single-handle mixer tap ; Model code or variant: Standard kitchen faucet ; Generation/Year: Modern (2010s-2020s) ; Color/Finish: Brushed chrome ; Material: Chromed brass body with ceramic cartridge ; Visible markings: None visible ; Distinguishing features: Single-lever handle, swivel spout, ceramic disc cartridge
problem_visual: Defect: Constant slow drip from the spout, audible and visible water bead forming every few seconds ; located at: The base of the swivel spout ; severity: Functional — water waste, will worsen ; visible signs: Water droplet pooling at the spout aerator, calcium streak on the chrome below, cabinet floor under the sink shows residual moisture
safety_warnings: Always shut off the hot AND cold supply valves under the sink before opening the tap
Place a towel in the sink to catch dropped parts
Do not over-tighten the new cartridge — you can crack the brass body
